Class CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

java.lang.Object
network.ike.plugin.CentralDeploySentinel.Builder
Enclosing class:
CentralDeploySentinel
public static final class CentralDeploySentinel.Builder extends Object
Fluent builder for CentralDeploySentinel. Required fields (state, artifactId, version, started, path) are validated by build(); the rest are optional and default to their type's zero / null.

    Method

    Validate required fields and build the immutable sentinel value.
    CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

    Set the finish instant; pass null for a sentinel still in CentralDeploySentinel.State.PENDING.
    CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

    Set the failure summary; pass null when not failed.
    CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

    Set the deploy-log file path.
    CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

    Set the configured maximum attempts.
    CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

    Set the advisory note; pass null when none.
    CentralDeploySentinel.Builder

    Set the sentinel-file path on disk.

    Set the subprocess PID.

    • state

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder state(CentralDeploySentinel.State v)
      Set the lifecycle state.
      Parameters:
      v - lifecycle state (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder artifactId(String v)
      Set the project artifactId.
      Parameters:
      v - project artifactId
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder version(String v)
      Set the release version.
      Parameters:
      v - release version
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • started

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder started(Instant v)
      Set the start instant.
      Parameters:
      v - start instant (UTC)
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • finished

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder finished(Instant v)
      Set the finish instant; pass null for a sentinel still in CentralDeploySentinel.State.PENDING.
      Parameters:
      v - finish instant, or null if pending
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • attempts

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder attempts(int v)
      Set the number of attempts taken.
      Parameters:
      v - attempts taken so far
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • maxAttempts

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder maxAttempts(int v)
      Set the configured maximum attempts.
      Parameters:
      v - configured max attempts
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • lastError

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder lastError(String v)
      Set the failure summary; pass null when not failed.
      Parameters:
      v - failure summary, or null
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • logFile

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder logFile(Path v)
      Set the deploy-log file path.
      Parameters:
      v - deploy log file path
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • pid

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder pid(long v)
      Set the subprocess PID.
      Parameters:
      v - subprocess PID, or 0 if not recorded
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • note

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder note(String v)
      Set the advisory note; pass null when none.
      Parameters:
      v - advisory note, or null
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • path

      public CentralDeploySentinel.Builder path(Path v)
      Set the sentinel-file path on disk. Required.
      Parameters:
      v - sentinel file path
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • build

      public CentralDeploySentinel build()
      Validate required fields and build the immutable sentinel value.
      Returns:
      the built immutable sentinel
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if any required field (state, artifactId, version, started, path) is unset
